name: Can I sue my employer if forklift crushed my leg on the job?
description: Workers' comp is exclusive remedy unless intentional or uninsured; sue third parties.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if forklift crushed my leg on the job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp is exclusive remedy unless intentional or uninsured; sue third parties.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Generally no, due to workers' compensation exclusive remedy, but yes if intentional harm or no insurance.** In Utah and Idaho, workers' comp covers job injuries like forklift accidents without suing the employer.[3] Exceptions: deliberate injury by supervisors or uninsured employers allow tort suits.[3] Key factors include proving intent (e.g., removed safety guards knowingly) or lack of coverage. For third-party fault like defective equipment, sue separately for full damages including pain and suffering.[1][3] File comp first, then explore exceptions with an attorney.
